title: blackbox devlog
description: Dev log for the BlackBox CKB point-of-sale device.

items.title: Fortnightly #5: The POS app comes alive on LVGL
items.content_text: BlackBox's on-device POS app takes shape on LVGL — payments, QR, full inventory CRUD and a sales cart/invoice flow on a new ILI9488 display target; the Vault companion wallet adds an on-chain Agent Gateway and embedded light client, and the board emulator goes agentic.

items.title: Fortnightly #4: BlackBox Vault companion wallet goes on-chain
items.content_text: BlackBox Vault — the native Android companion wallet — ships Wave 2 with Nervos DAO, real on-chain ML-DSA-65 post-quantum sends, and biometric security gates; the board emulator gains thermal printer and QR-scanner peripherals.

items.title: Fortnightly #3: Board emulator, LVGL port, and a PQC messaging protocol
items.content_text: Open-source ESP32 board emulator shrinks the embedded debug loop, BlackBox is being ported to LVGL on top of it, and a new post-quantum messaging protocol (cemp-pq) lands for the backend.

items.title: Fortnightly #2: Wi-Fi flow refactor and V2 prototype on the bench
items.content_text: Wi-Fi flow refactor lands three new screens and a set of new UI primitives; V2 prototype board on the bench; NFC and Fiber integrations planned.

items.title: Fortnightly #1: UI primitives and the open-source backend stack
items.content_text: First fortnightly entry. UI redesign steps 1–3 of PLAN.md complete; eight weeks of backend protocol design surfaced as open-source repos; new hardware components unlock NFC and integrated light client paths.

items.title: Hello, wave 2
items.content_text: Opening entry. Wave 1 (six testing units) shipped; wave 2 starts now.
